---
name: New scenario suggestion
about: Suggest a new storage governance scenario for future support
title: "[Scenario Idea] "
labels: enhancement, scenario
assignees: ""
---

## Scenario summary

Describe the Windows storage problem you want the app to recognize.

## Example paths or apps

List representative directories, files, apps, or registry locations.

## Why is it valuable?

Explain why this should become a first-class governance scenario.

## Suggested action model

If you have a view, describe:

- typical risk level
- pre-check items
- post-check items
- whether dry-run and rollback should be supported
